title: Hold My Items - Reforged
description: A client-side Forge mod that makes holding items feel immersive and real.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51d31bf3e2400741d65a972fc12a60b36362df52.png)
**IMPORTANT: This mod is a Forge port of the Fabric mod [Original Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) by [thesapling]**

### 🎮 What it does

Have you ever noticed how your Minecraft character holds items… _but doesn’t look like they actually hold them?_

**Hold My Items** fixes that!

This mod **renders your character's arm** whenever you hold an item, giving you the impression that your character is physically holding it — just like in real life!
It’s subtle, but it adds a huge amount of immersion to your gameplay.



### ✅ Features
- Renders the **main-hand arm** while holding an item
- Also renders the **off-hand arm** with proper animation and orientation
- MB-3D Items Pack support (_change config value_)
- Adds **contextual animations** when: (Swimming, Crawling, Climbing, Holding items like lanterns or maps)

- Fully client-side — **does not require installation on servers**
- **Lightweight and compatible with most mods**

### 🧱 Modpack Friendly
Yes! This mod is 100% client-side.


### 📦 Original Mod
This mod is a Forge port of the Fabric mod [Original Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) by [thesapling].
All credits for the original idea and implementation go to him!
This Forge version was created by **bene2212**.
